nodes.title: Note: How to draw mask
widgets_values: Right-click on the Load Image node, then click Open in `Maskeditor` to edit the mask.

nodes.title: Note: About OneReward and Model links
widgets_values:
Guide: [Subgraph](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)

## Model links

**text_encoders**

- [clip_l.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/comfyanonymous/flux_text_encoders/resolve/main/clip_l.safetensors?download=true)
- [t5xxl_fp16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/comfyanonymous/flux_text_encoders/resolve/main/t5xxl_fp16.safetensors?download=true)
- [t5xxl_fp16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/comfyanonymous/flux_text_encoders/resolve/main/t5xxl_fp16.safetensors)

**loras**

- [removal_timestep_alpha-2-1740.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/lrzjason/ObjectRemovalFluxFill/resolve/main/removal_timestep_alpha-2-1740.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [flux.1-fill-dev-OneReward-transformer_fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/OneReward_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/flux.1-fill-dev-OneReward-transformer_fp8.safetensors)

**vae**

- [ae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Lumina_Image_2.0_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      ├── clip_l.safetensors
│   │      ├── t5xxl_fp16.safetensors
│   │      └── t5xxl_fp16.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │      └── removal_timestep_alpha-2-1740.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── flux.1-fill-dev-OneReward-transformer_fp8.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── ae.safetensors
```


## Report issue

Note: please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud will be updated after the stable release; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: Note: About object removal
widgets_values:
By default, this group is an image inpainting workflow. 

You can select the  the 
**LoraLoaderModelOnly** node and use **Ctrl+B** to enable it, which will turn it into an object removal workflow.
